description: Create 8 doc generation tasks in new ccb_docgen suite. Supersedes ceiling-saturated ccb_k8sdocs. Tasks require generating architecture docs, API references, and migration guides for complex multi-package systems. Weighted checklist scoring on topic coverage.

userStories.title: Create docgen-arch-001: Envoy HTTP connection manager architecture doc
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want a task where the agent produces an architecture document for Envoy's HTTP connection manager spanning filter chain, codec, router, and upstream components. Must explain how components interact, not just list APIs.
acceptanceCriteria: task.toml has category=architecture_doc, language=cpp, difficulty=hard, time_limit_sec=1200
instruction.md asks for architecture doc covering: component responsibilities, data flow, extension points, error handling
ground_truth.json has 10-15 required concepts with file references, weighted by importance
Task registered in configs/selected_benchmark_tasks.json and docgen_2config.sh
userStories.notes: Envoy conn manager spans: source/common/http/conn_manager_impl.cc, source/common/http/filter_manager.cc, source/common/router/router.cc, source/common/upstream/cluster_manager_impl.cc.

userStories.title: Create docgen-arch-002: Istio Pilot discovery architecture doc
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want a task documenting Istio Pilot's discovery service architecture: xDS serving, config translation, service registry, and multi-cluster support.
acceptanceCriteria: ground_truth.json has 10-15 required concepts spanning pilot/pkg/xds/, pilot/pkg/model/, pilot/pkg/config/
userStories.notes: Istio Pilot at f8af3caeb1 (master 2026-02-16). 13 required_topics covering DiscoveryServer, ADS, PushContext, ServiceRegistry. 5 file_references (discovery.go, ads.go, push_context.go, serviceregistry/kube/controller, networking/core). 3 data_flow items. 4 extension_points. Registered in selected_benchmark_tasks.json and docgen_2config.sh.

userStories.title: Create docgen-arch-003: Terraform plan/apply pipeline architecture doc
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want a task documenting Terraform's plan/apply pipeline: graph builder, provider interface, state management, and hook system.
userStories.notes: Terraform at a3dc571150 (main 2026-02-16). 13 required_topics covering GraphTransformer, ConfigTransformer, StateTransformer, ReferenceTransformer, ProviderTransformer, provider plugin, state manager, SyncState, GraphNodeExecutable, ContextGraphWalker, dynamic expansion. 5 file_references (internal/terraform/context.go, graph_builder, node_resource, providers, states). 3 data_flow (plan execution, apply execution, state read-modify-persist). 4 extension_points. Registered in selected_benchmark_tasks.json and docgen_2config.sh.

userStories.title: Create docgen-api-001: VS Code Extension API reference
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want a task where the agent generates API reference documentation for a specific VS Code extension API surface (e.g., TextDocument API or Diagnostic API). Must include parameter semantics, error cases, and usage examples from internal callers.
acceptanceCriteria: instruction.md specifies a particular API surface to document (not the entire extension API)
ground_truth.json includes: required API methods, required behavioral notes, required usage examples
userStories.notes: VS Code: src/vs/vscode.d.ts defines the API surface. src/vs/workbench/ and extensions/ have internal callers. Use find_references to discover usage patterns.

userStories.title: Create docgen-api-002: Cilium eBPF map API reference
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want a task documenting Cilium's eBPF map API: map types, operations, Go wrappers, and lifecycle management.
acceptanceCriteria: language=go, ground_truth.json includes map types, CRUD operations, GC/pinning behavior
userStories.notes: Cilium: pkg/maps/ (Go wrappers), bpf/ (C definitions). Map lifecycle: creation, pinning, GC via pkg/maps/ctmap/, pkg/maps/lbmap/.

userStories.title: Create docgen-api-003: Kafka Consumer API reference
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want a task documenting Kafka's KafkaConsumer Java API with behavioral notes about rebalancing, offset management, and error handling.
acceptanceCriteria: language=java, ground_truth includes: poll semantics, rebalance callbacks, offset commit strategies
userStories.notes: Kafka: clients/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/clients/consumer/KafkaConsumer.java. Rich behavioral semantics around poll(), commitSync(), rebalance listeners.

userStories.title: Create docgen-migration-001: Migration guide from Terraform code changes
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want a task where the agent analyzes breaking changes between two Terraform versions and produces a migration guide. Dockerfile provides two commits (old stable, new stable with breaking changes).
acceptanceCriteria: Dockerfile clones repo and sets up two worktrees or directories for old and new versions
instruction.md asks: 'Analyze changes between version X and Y. Produce a migration guide for users upgrading.'
ground_truth.json includes: required breaking changes identified, correct migration steps per change
userStories.notes: Choose two Terraform minor versions with documented breaking changes (see CHANGELOG.md). MCP compare_revisions directly compares the two versions.

userStories.title: Create docgen-migration-002: Migration guide from Envoy version upgrade
userStories.description: As a benchmark developer, I want a migration guide task for an Envoy version upgrade with known API changes (e.g., v2 → v3 xDS API migration).
acceptanceCriteria: language=cpp, ground_truth has specific API changes and migration steps
MCP advantage: compare_revisions + diff_search for finding all changed APIs
userStories.notes: Envoy xDS v2→v3 migration is well-documented. Choose a narrower scope — e.g., changes in a specific filter's config proto between two versions.
